title: AgentActionReceipt
description: A cryptographic receipt proving that an autonomous agent took a specific action on behalf of a human principal. The foundational trust artifact of the Human Root of Trust framework. Every agent action must produce a receipt. Public domain.

id.description: Unique receipt identifier. Implementations should use a format that is sortable and embeds a timestamp.

agentId.description: Identifier of the agent that took the action.

action.description: The action type that was executed. Snake_case convention.

principal.description: The human principal on whose behalf this action was taken.

timestamp.description: When this action was executed. ISO 8601 UTC.

payloadHash.description: Hash of the action payload. Format: {algorithm}:{hex}

signingAlgorithm.description: The algorithm used to produce the signature. Implementations should support at minimum 'ecdsa-p256'. Hybrid post-quantum schemes are encouraged for long-lived receipts.

signature.description: Base64-encoded classical signature over the canonical signing payload.

keyId.description: Identifier of the signing key. Should be hardware-rooted where possible. Format is implementation-defined.

signingPayload.description: The canonical string that was signed. Implementations must define a deterministic serialization. Recommended format: {id}|{agentId}|{action}|{principal}|{unixTimestamp}|{payloadHash}

description.description: Human-readable description of the action taken.
examples: Weekly status report composed and sent to eduardo@zerohumanco.ai

authorizationChainId.description: ID of the AuthorizationChain that authorized this action, if applicable.

$comment: Public domain. Human Root of Trust framework — humanrootoftrust.org. No rights reserved.
